generated_oml:
instance BuildingInfrastructureEnvironment : DTDFVocab:DigitalTwin [
    base:desc "A building infrastructure in the AECO domain, specifically a Living Lab case study, serving as a cyber-physical asset represented by a unified virtual model for real-time monitoring, simulation, and optimization of building operations"
    base:contains TemperatureSensor, OccupancySensor, LightSensor, LightingActuator, HVACActuator, BIMModel, RealTimeMonitoringService, EnergyOptimizationService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, VisualizationService, ValidationService
]

instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SystemComponent [
    base:desc "Temperature sensor integrated into building infrastructure, transmitting data via MQTT protocols to Eclipse Hono"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SystemComponent [
    base:desc "Occupancy sensor integrated into building infrastructure, transmitting data via MQTT protocols to Eclipse Hono"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance LightSensor : DTDFVocab:SystemComponent [
    base:desc "Light sensor integrated into building infrastructure, transmitting data via MQTT protocols to Eclipse Hono"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightDataTransmitted
]

instance LightingActuator : DTDFVocab:SystemComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator for lighting systems configured within BIM models and managed via Eclipse Hono and Ditto"
]

instance HVACActuator : DTDFVocab:SystemComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator for HVAC controls configured within BIM models and managed via Eclipse Hono and Ditto"
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:ProducedData [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:ProducedData [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance LightDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:ProducedData [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightSensor
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:DataInput [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature data streams processed via Eclipse Hono"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHonoEnabler, EclipseDittoEnabler
]

instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:DataInput [
    base:desc "Real-time occupancy data streams processed via Eclipse Hono"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHonoEnabler, EclipseDittoEnabler
]

instance LightData : DTDFVocab:DataInput [
    base:desc "Real-time light status data streams processed via Eclipse Hono"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LightDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHonoEnabler, EclipseDittoEnabler
]

instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM model enriched with Building Control System semantics including device metadata, spatial geometry, and component relationships"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AutodeskRevitEnabler, MDEToolsEnabler
]

instance AutodeskRevitEnabler : DTDFVocab:Implementation [
    base:desc "Autodesk Revit for BIM modeling"
]

instance EclipseHonoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Implementation [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono for IoT data ingestion and processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, EnergyOptimizationService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance EclipseDittoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Implementation [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto for digital twin management and bidirectional communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, EnergyOptimizationService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, VisualizationService
]

instance UnrealEngine5Enabler : DTDFVocab:Implementation [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 for 3D visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance MDEToolsEnabler : DTDFVocab:Implementation [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering tools for automated transformation of BIM models to runtime artifacts and ODTE validation"
    DTDFVocab:enables EnergyOptimizationService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, ValidationService
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of building operations using sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides ComfortAnalysis
]

instance EnergyOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Energy optimization using reinforcement learning algorithms"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyConsumptionReport
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for facility management using sensor data and simulations"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveMaintenanceAlert
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization of building operations via Unreal Engine 5"
    DTDFVocab:provides Interactive3DVisualization
]

instance ValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Digital twin validation using Overall Digital Twin Entanglement metric"
    DTDFVocab:provides ODTEValidationInsight
]

instance ComfortAnalysis : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Comfort analysis derived from sensor data and simulations for facility managers"
]

instance EnergyConsumptionReport : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Energy consumption reports derived from sensor data and simulations"
]

instance PredictiveMaintenanceAlert : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive maintenance alerts derived from sensor data and simulations"
]

instance Interactive3DVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization of building operations for real-time monitoring"
]

instance ODTEValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Overall Digital Twin Entanglement metric validation for interoperability and architectural soundness"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands (e.g., lighting setpoints, HVAC adjustments) generated by DT services and sent via Eclipse Hono to physical actuators for real-time adjustments."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization of sensor data and control commands with minimal latency for operational monitoring; simulation and optimization services execute at intervals determined by system configuration."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A centralized hub integrating BIM models, Eclipse Hono for IoT data ingestion, Eclipse Ditto for digital twin management, and Unreal Engine 5 for visualization, with modular services connected via standardized extension points to enable coordination between physical assets, data streams, and user-facing services."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase ('as operated'), extending BIM's design-time focus to include continuous lifecycle management from construction through refurbishment during building usage."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation using the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric to assess interoperability and architectural soundness, with ongoing synchronization techniques to address semantic drift and ensure alignment between digital models and physical counterparts."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol with TLS encryption for secure data transmission between physical assets and Eclipse Hono, with Ditto managing digital twin state and communication."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Cloud-based deployment of Eclipse Hono and Ditto as middleware services, with Unreal Engine visualization hosted on web servers or local workstations; the framework utilizes scalable containerized microservices architecture."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Integration with external Building Management Systems (BMS), IoT platforms, and enterprise systems via standardized APIs (e.g., REST, MQTT) to enable cross-system data exchange and interoperability within the AECO ecosystem."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Adherence to BIM standards (e.g., IFC schema), MQTT protocol specifications, Eclipse Ditto's digital twin management standards, and standardized extension points for service integration."
]
